name: Aviva plc
description: Aviva plc is a leading international insurance, wealth, and retirement business headquartered in London, United Kingdom. The company provides a wide range of insurance, savings, and investment products to millions of customers, primarily across its core markets in the UK, Ireland, and Canada. With a history dating back over 300 years, Aviva is committed to helping customers plan for the future and manage risk, while also focusing on sustainable investment and achieving net-zero carbon emissions across its operations.
